title: Country Road Creature
description: add a creepy man or creature to your minecraft! ...scary mod
body:
- this mods add a creepy man 

- you can call him:
- **_~~COUNTRY ROAD CREATURE~~_**

- it have phases:

- Behavior changes by phase level:
- Phase 0
1. No activity
- Phase 1
1. Spawns and watches from far away
2. Disappears if players get too close or hit it
3.  Phase 2
3. Moves closer to players
Stops at medium distance and continues stalking
> Flees if approached
- Phase 3
1. Can become aggressive at close range
2. Uses full attack abilities
3. Configuration

- Change phase with gamerule setCountryRoadCreaturePhase (0–3)
Phase can also be changed with special phase items or commands
Block breaking can be disabled with mobGriefing = false


![the creepy man (country road)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd26c7c808ecc1e3fe513305fe4ae875a45c8835_0.webp)
